g.text: SSH Key Setup for iPad Access
how do i rejoin a previous session? i was designing my TUI for ses
In Claude Code, you can resume previous sessions with:
Session Recovery and Log Trace Check
Voice URL Path Not Found Error
- `claude --resume <session-id>` — resume a specific session by ID
Agent Status Check and Progress Review
Sessions are stored as JSONL files under `~/.claude/projects/<proj
(one file per session, named by UUID) — useful if your TUI is read
SSH Key for Bridge QR Code
the current working directory. Run it from the same directory you
original session in, otherwise Claude Code looks in the wrong proj
